title: Error Taxonomy, Wrapping, Retry Decisions, User Recovery, and Exit
description: Every failure becomes unable to fetch, handlers log and return nil, retries include invalid input, wrapped causes are discarded, and one command failure terminates the session. Learners cumulatively produce causal recoverable Pokedex error contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Classify input, not found, protocol, timeout, cancellation, transport, decode, invariant, persistence, and internal errors by caller decision.
Wrap context with percent-w while preserving sentinel or typed matching and avoid exposing unstable internal prose as API.
Retry only explicitly transient idempotent work under attempt, time, spacing, cancellation, and fair-use budgets.
